summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cohorts, Spaces, Community, and Archives features. All 28 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed including page loads, create dialogs, and CRUD operations.
critical_code_review_comments: All Cohort endpoints correctly implement role-based access control (faculty+ for create/link/unlink)
Cohort detail endpoint correctly enriches data with linked courses and member progress
Spaces list endpoint correctly shows members-only spaces to all users for discovery (with content stripped)
Space access request/approval flow works correctly
Community posts support create, reply, and like toggle functionality
Archives correctly filter restricted items for students (only public visible)
Archive delete requires admin role as expected
All endpoints properly require authentication via X-Session-ID header
Sidebar navigation includes all required links: Dashboard, Courses, Live Teaching, Cohorts, Spaces, Community, Archives, Messages

test_credentials.test_users_created: COHORT_SPACE_TEST_ and UI_TEST_ prefixed users created in MongoDB, cleaned up after tests

seed_data_creation: Test users (admin, faculty, student), cohorts, spaces, posts, archives created with test prefixes, all cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cohorts, Spaces, Community, and Archives features fully tested. Backend: POST/GET /api/cohorts (CRUD), GET /api/cohorts/{id}/detail (enriched), POST /api/cohorts/{id}/join|leave, POST/DELETE /api/cohorts/{id}/courses (link/unlink). POST/GET /api/spaces (CRUD), POST /api/spaces/{id}/request-access, POST /api/spaces/{id}/approve/{user_id}, POST /api/spaces/{id}/resources, DELETE /api/spaces/{id}. POST/GET /api/community/posts, POST /api/community/posts/{id}/reply|like. POST/GET /api/archives, DELETE /api/archives/{id} (admin only). Frontend: All pages load correctly with proper data-testid attributes. Create dialogs work for all features. Role-based UI elements (create buttons) visible only for appropriate roles.

Create Space dialog with access level dropdown - PASSED

Archive Item dialog with type and access level dropdowns - PASSED
Archive creation submits and archive appears in grid - PASSED
